summary: Increment visible correction version after the Update08 formation link-helper fix so preview users can distinguish the deployed correction.
rootCause: The Update08 correction was made without incrementing the visible Update suffix, making preview state indistinguishable from the prior Update08 build.
externalizationDecision: No HTML changes; visible Update08.1 labels are driven by metadata and existing external JavaScript.
unresolvedItems: Confirm push-triggered preview workflow result and preview commit after the branch is pushed.
Verify the preview URL shows 3.0.0.0 Update08.1 after deployment.
